prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-TOOLBOXTOY-YLW-XC930A Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Boys 28pc Tools and Tool Box Work Bench Playset, DIY Pretend Play Construction Toys, Yellow, Ages 3+ Description: Calling all little repairmen, this Kidplokio Tools and Tool Box Work Bench playset allows for exciting DIY and fixer-upper pretend play. Kids will love setting up their work bench and tackling projects around the house, workshop, garage and more with Mom, Dad, family and friends.

Designed with small hands in mind, little grease monkeys can enjoy hours of pretend play with this perfectly sized kids' tools and work bench kit; the construction power tools playset is a great way to activate imagination and creativity, giving little one's confidence to take on any project. And, not only will this fun tools and tool box work bench playset provide little ones with hours of imaginative cosplay and creativity, it will also engage their cognitive problem solving skills and help to develop fine motor skills too.

All the tools included in this kids work bench playset fit perfectly back into the included tool box for easy storage, organization and to ensure nothing gets lose. Don't worry about tripping over pieces or losing them, when kids are done playing, everything packs away nicely into the tool box until they're ready to play again.

Snapping securely closed and featuring a built-in handle for carrying, the tool box work bench playset is great for family travel and playdates, easily fitting in a backpack, tote bag or carry-on luggage when not in use.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts Search Terms: boys diy just like dad construction builder creative play gift for boys toddles 2 3 4 5 years old Features: - TOOLS AND TOOL BOX WORK BENCH PLAYSET: Calling all little repairmen, this Kidplokio Tools and Tool Box Work Bench playset allows for exciting DIY and fixer-upper pretend play! Kids will love setting up their work bench and tackling projects around the house, workshop, garage and more - FUN PRETEND PLAY WITH TOOLS: Designed with small hands in mind, little grease monkeys can enjoy hours of pretend play with this perfectly sized kids' tools and work bench kit; the construction power tools playset is a great way to activate imagination and creativity, giving little one's confidence to take on any project - TODDLER LEARNING TOYS: And, not only will this fun construction toys or building toys playset provide little ones with hours of imaginative cosplay and creativity, it will also engage their cognitive problem solving skills and help to develop fine motor skills, dexterity and hand-eye coordination too! - NEAT AND TIDY STORAGE: All the tools included in this kids work bench playset fit perfectly back into the included tool box for easy storage, organization and to ensure nothing gets lost! Snapping securely closed and featuring a built-in handle for carrying, the tool box work bench playset is also ideal for family travel - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 8.5 x 4 inches; Weight: 1.50lbs; Color: Yellow; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
